name: Events Pipeline Consolidation
description: Consolidate bifurcated events tracking (alerts + site) into unified pipeline
objective: Single coordinated system with bidirectional sync, reliable digests, consolidated agents
key_decisions: DB is SSOT - luma_events.db is source of truth, JSON exports are derived
Status flow: new → scored → approved/rejected/maybe → registered
Digest format: Top 5 events with scores, organizer trust, action links

workers.description: Create the missing luma_digest.py script that generates actionable event digests
Create luma_unified_pipeline.py - single orchestrator for scrape→score→export→digest→email
Add bidirectional sync: site decisions update DB status, site reads live from DB
Create unified Daily Events Pipeline agent, disable old fragmented agents
Add score display, sync status indicator, must-go organizer filters to site
